summary: The external API connector accepts an explicit API operation inventory, augments discovery from an optional OpenAPI document when available, redacts secret values from public configuration, and registers the external_api provider in the connector catalog.
assertions: The connector registry exposes the external_api provider and loads the ExternalApiConnector implementation path.
The connector returns a redacted public configuration without a credentials field.
Discovery merges configured operations with optional OpenAPI operations without duplicating entries.
Sync invokes the sink with the public configuration and discovery result.
The connector configuration rejects missing operation inventory at construction time.
